rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC performs strongly in trend regime
HYPE BUY is a net-negative setup: 23% WR on 35 live trades, -$77.26 total loss

SOL BUY was net-negative on old data (24% WR, 34 live trades) but 10d_v3 shows 100% WR (8/8, +$1,895) and 20d shows 73.1% WR (26 trades, +$2,486). DEACTIVATED Run101: multi-window evidence (10d+20d both strongly positive) confirms regime shift. Replaced by sol_long_probe_boost_v1 for positive reinforcement.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN101_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): Rec1 from audit 2026-06-20T18:06:20Z — SOL LONG 100% WR 10d_v3 (8/8, +$1895) AND 73.1% WR 20d (26 trades, +$2486). Multi-window confirmation eliminates statistical noise objection. Veto deactivated. sol_long_probe_boost_v1 added as positive probe. Re-escalate if live SOL LONG WR<40% on n>=15 trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Night session 00:00-06:00 UTC yields only 19% WR on 27 live trades, -$136.83 total loss
Illiquid regime yields only 28% WR on 57 trades with 71.9% noise-stop rate
HYPE SELL is net-negative EV: -$16.65 per trade on 239 live trades
BTC SELL at 70-79% confidence is the single largest loss bucket across all setups
rules.gate_reduction_reason: RUN85_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): 100d shows BTC SHORT 70-79% at -$0.54/trade (neutral) vs 10d -$91.87 (cherry-picked bear regime). Halved penalty -20->-10. times_applied=3 times_correct=0 further supports reduction.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC SELL at 90%+ confidence is the #1 edge: 67% WR, +$102.92/trade EV on 43 trades. Strongly contradicts the general BTC_SHORT negative-EV pattern. This is the profit bin.
rules.gate_demotion_reason: DEMOTED Run82 2026-06-19T12:05:34Z: 10d evidence (67% WR, n=43) contradicted by 100d backtest (50% WR, -$3.48/trade, n=10). Rule has times_applied=0 — possibly broken condition match. Reducing gate=100%->20% (probe mode) pending live verification. Graduate back to 50% if WR>=60% n>=15; deactivate if WR<45% n>=15.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN110_AUTO_FIX (conf=85%>=75%): Run106 audit identified direct conflict with short_direction_veto_v1 (active, gate=20). BTC SHORT 10d_v3: -$7.22 EV/trade, -$1,407 total (195 trades). boost rule has times_applied=0 and never fired live. Veto takes precedence. Re-activate only if short_direction_veto_v1 is deactivated AND BTC SHORT 90%+ demonstrates WR>=60% on n>=20 live trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH in TRENDING regime = 71% WR, +$9.49/trade EV on 7 live trades. Strongest cross-regime edge after BTC_TRENDING (80% WR, n=5). Regime x symbol interaction: trending regime filters out noise trades.

HYPE in UNKNOWN regime achieves 83% WR, +$6.56/trade (n=6). Highest-WR setup found across all symbol×regime combinations. Possible regime-transition breakout signal. SIDE-AGNOSTIC probe — does not conflict with HYPE_LONG/HYPE_SHORT vetoes since this targets unknown regime only.

Signals with 60-70% confidence are net-negative: 46.3% WR on 123 trades, -$2321 total PnL. Worst performing confidence bin across all symbols and regimes. GATED (2026-05-17): adjustment reduced -20→-5 to break compounding deadlock with self_tuning CONSERVATIVE mode. Evidence conflict: insight_journal (67 trades) shows +$2.19/trade EV in this bin; rule built on older 123-trade window. -5pts preserves caution without total block. REACTIVATED Run105: 10d_v3 shows 14.3% WR (1/7 trades) — complete collapse.
rules.enabled_reason: RUN105_AUTO_FIX (conf=75%>=75%): Run104 audit — 60-70% confidence bin = 14.3% WR (1/7 trades) in 10d_v3. Complete collapse from 20d (50% WR). Symbol-agnostic. Each blocked trade saves est. avg -$131. Gate=20 (probe: blocks 80% of trades, passes 20% for monitoring). Suspend if 3+ consecutive wins in this bin. Re-evaluate at n=20.
rules.ab_tracking: Gate=20 A/B probe. Baseline: 14.3% WR (10d), 50% WR (20d), 46.3% WR (123-trade historical). Deactivate if live WR in this bin >=45% on n>=20 live trades. Escalate gate to 50% if WR remains <30% on n>=20.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC BUY in TRENDING regime = 18% WR on 17 live trades. Original BTC+trend boost (rule_1777922205_0) was 0/3 correct and deactivated. This counter-rule completes the triple protection stack: (1) this -13pt penalty gate=20%, (2) Critic prompt auto-challenges all BTC BUY by default, (3) parent boost rule deactivated. Graduate: escalate gate to 50% at n>=10 obs with WR<=0.45.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: GRADUATION_CRITERION_MET: pending_ab_graduation threshold was n>=10 WR<=0.45. Live data: 17 trades at 18% WR. Threshold met (17>=10, 0.18<=0.45). Feedback BTC_LONG_reduce at gate=50%. Triple protection stack (counter+Critic prompt+parent disabled). Conf=0.92 >> 0.75 threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Evening session 18:00-24:00 UTC yields 65% WR vs 10% night (spread 55%). n=27 live trades. Second-best TOD window after morning.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: insight INVALIDATED in insights.json — actual WR=33% not 65%. Built on invalidated data. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Afternoon session 12:00-18:00 UTC yields 64% WR vs 31% night (spread 33%). n=27 live trades. Third-best TOD window.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: insight INVALIDATED in insights.json — actual WR=33% not 65%. Built on invalidated data. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: high_volatility regime = 55% WR vs 38% avg across all regimes. Best regime for trading by WR margin. Feedback engine: gate=80%, n=2172, conf=88%. LLM engine was missing this rule — sync gap detected 2026-05-22T01:06 UTC. Exempt from illiquid penalty stacking (different regime). Graduate: escalate gate 20%→50% at n>=25 obs with WR>=0.52.

Morning session 06:00-12:00 UTC = 74% WR on 7 insight_journal trades. BEST TOD window by WR (74% vs 65% evening, 64% afternoon, 19% night). Composite edge: ETH+BTC+trending+morning = confirmed alpha. Missing from LLM engine despite being tracked in feedback/graduated_rules.json (A/B_ACTIVE gate=50%) — write-consistency bug detected 2026-05-21T23:06 UTC. Graduate: escalate gate 50%→100% at n>=15 obs with WR>=0.65.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: n=7 insufficient evidence (below n=15 graduation threshold). insight_journal insight #6 directly contradicts with 14% WR for same session window. Two active insights give 74% vs 14% — conflicted data cannot support an active rule. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 70% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
BTC BUY with bollinger_squeeze = 69% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN90_AUTO_FIX (conf=91%>=75%): btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 has evidence_ratio=0.69 (69% WR) on n=2172 shadow signals. Deep_memory confirms BTC_BUY_BB as Tier-1 golden setup. Graduation criterion met: WR=69%>=60% on n=2172>>15. Note: btc_long_veto_v1 at gate=80% limits pass-through, this rule provides targeted BB exception. Escalating gate 20%->50%.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL BUY with bollinger_squeeze = 67% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.disabled_reason: Dead rule: sol_long_veto_v1 (gate=100%) always wins. SOL BUY WR=24%. Boost never fires. Disabled 2026-05-23.

rules.hypothesis_statement: HYPE SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 35% WR (n=2172). Worst BB setup. Block.
BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (n=2172). When both bollinger_squeeze AND multi_tier_quality fire, it's a contra-indicator. Penalize.
Ranging regime: 25% WR on 16 live trades (worse than illiquid 28.1%). Structurally losing regime.

80-85% confidence bin = 36.1% WR, -$52.16/trade avg on 100d backtest (n=36, 589 total trades). Worst performing confidence bin. Confidence anti-correlation confirmed by deep_memory (conf=0.93, n=2172): high confidence is NOT predictive above 80%. CONTRADICTED in 10d+20d: 80-90% bin = 66.7% WR (10d, n=12) and 81.8% WR (20d). DEACTIVATED Run105.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN84_AUTO_ESCALATION: Graduation criterion already met by 100d backtest data (WR=36.1%<45% n>=15). 80-85% bin: 36.1% WR on n=36. Full 80-90% bin: 40% WR on n=120. Conf=0.88 >> 0.75 threshold. Escalating 20%->50%.
rules.outcome_tracking: DEACTIVATED Run105: 80-90% bin now BEST tier (66.7% WR 10d_v3 n=12, 81.8% WR 20d). Rule was penalizing the strongest confidence tier. Regime shift from 100d bear to recent bull. Re-activate if 80-85% WR<45% on n>=20 live trades.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN105_AUTO_FIX (conf=88%>=75%): Run104 audit — 80-90% confidence bin = 66.7% WR (10d_v3, 8/12 trades, +$1,535) and 81.8% WR (20d). BEST performing tier. Rule built on 100d bear-regime data (Apr-May). Regime shifted May 2026. Penalizing best tier estimated -$109/day impact. Re-activate if WR<45% on n>=20 live 80-85% trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL SELL = 34.6% WR on 52 live paper trades (suspension probe). Structurally weak short side.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: 179-trade 10d simulation shows SOL SHORT = 64% WR +$32.44/trade. Rule based on 52 stale paper trades is contradicted by 3.4x larger dataset. Re-evaluate if SOL SHORT live WR drops below 50% on n>=20 post-restart trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC LONG (BUY) was net-negative on old 100d data (32% WR, 41 trades). 10d_v3 shows 57.1% WR (7 trades, +$257). 20d shows 57.1% WR (14 trades, +$231). Multi-window positive trend. DEACTIVATED Run101: both 10d and 20d windows show positive WR above breakeven. btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 (gate=50%) and btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (gate=50%) remain active for targeted sub-conditions.
rules.disabled_reason: RUN101_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): Rec1 from audit 2026-06-20T18:06:20Z — BTC LONG 57.1% WR in BOTH 10d_v3 (7 trades) AND 20d (14 trades). Multi-window confirmation above breakeven (~52%). btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 and btc_trend_long_counter_v1 remain active for risk management. Deactivate general veto. Re-activate if live BTC LONG WR<40% on n>=20 trades.
rules.conflict_note: btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 (gate=50%) still active for BB-specific BTC LONGs. btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (gate=50%) covers trend regime. Those two rules now become primary gating mechanism.
rules.graduate_criteria: Re-activate if BTC_LONG WR<40% on n>=20 live trades post-restart.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SHORT direction across all symbols: 18% WR (2/11 trades, -$2,104 net) in 10d_v3 backtest. SHORT SL losses 2.65x LONG SL losses. HYPE SHORT 100d: 48.4% WR but -$4,587 total (massive loss magnitude). SOL SHORT 100d: 45% WR, -$1,003. BTC SHORT 100d: 45.6% WR, -$87 (near breakeven). PROBE MODE: gate=20 to allow some SHORT exposure for regime testing. NOTE Run110: SOL_SHORT 10d shows WR=63.7%, EV=$32.44 (n=179) — may need SOL exception.
rules.source_audit: Runs 95-99 forensics: 10d SHORT catastrophic, 100d payoff ratio 0.91 dominated by SL losses on SHORTS
rules.expected_impact: Blocks 80% of SHORT trades. At 18% WR, avoiding 8/10 SHORT trades saves ~$152/10 trades.
rules.conflict_note: hype_short_veto_v1 (gate=100%) already blocks HYPE SELL. This adds broader SHORT veto. DOES NOT conflict with btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 at gate=20 — both gates apply sequentially. Run110: SOL_SHORT WR=63.7% (n=179) may warrant SOL exception — flagged for manual review.
rules.graduate_criteria: Reduce gate to 0 (deactivate) if SHORT WR>=50% on n>=30 live trades. Escalate to gate=50 if SHORT WR<25% on n>=15 live trades. Review SOL SHORT exception at n>=20 SOL SHORT live trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: 80-90% confidence bin: 40% WR, 53.3% SL rate, avg -$33.04/trade on n=120 trades (100d backtest). PARADOX: higher confidence correlates with WORSE outcomes. High-confidence signals may be entering at overextended levels OR CONF_SIZING_tiered_leverage amplifies absolute loss. Penalize to counteract overconfidence entry sizing.
rules.source_audit: Run99 audit (2026-06-20T16:06:05Z): confidence paradox confirmed at n=589 statistical significance
rules.expected_impact: Reduce avg loss in 85-90% bin. Complements high_conf_80_85_penalty_v1 (gate=50) which covers 80-85%.
rules.graduate_criteria: Escalate gate to 50% if 85-90% WR remains <45% on n>=30 live trades. Deactivate if WR>=55% on n>=30.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL BUY = 100% WR (8/8, +$1,895) in 10d_v3 and 73.1% WR (26 trades, +$2,486) in 20d. PROBE BOOST replaces sol_long_veto_v1 which was deactivated Run101. Adds +5pts to all SOL BUY signals at gate=50% to reinforce the strongest current setup. A/B: graduate adjustment to +8pts and gate to 80% if live WR>=65% on n>=15 trades. Revert and re-evaluate if WR<45% on n>=15.
rules.source_audit: Run100 audit (2026-06-20T18:06:20Z) Rec1 — inverted veto deactivated, positive probe added
rules.expected_impact: +$124/day (SOL LONG EV) fully unblocked. +5pts boost adds directional confidence to filter weak SOL setups.

rules.hypothesis_statement: In trending regime, 87% of early SL exits (<2h) had TP1 reachable afterward. $1,119.29 missed over 60d (87/352 SLs). Hold guard prevents early exit before 3h mark in trending regime.
rules.expected_impact: +$5-15/day when live (conservative: 30% recovery of 87 recoverable SL exits)
